case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCIAL CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA VS. RUSSELL ROBINSON et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO CROSS-COMPLAINT BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-09-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES CSR# 3689 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2010 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for cross complainant's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that the cross complaint is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The case is scheduled for a Case Management Conference on 10/16/2009 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones CSR# 3689 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Cross-Complainant in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/09/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones CSR# 3689 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Continued To Jul-15-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Cross Complainant's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/15/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Nici Rodich CSR# 11604 (212)
Written sanctions not issued due to incorrect address.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-13-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
